straw.Name: Straw Substrate
straw.Description: Simple substrate made from straw. Perfect for oyster mushrooms.

sawdust.Name: Sawdust Substrate
sawdust.Description: Basic sawdust substrate for cold-preferring mushrooms.

sawdust_supplemented.Name: Supplemented Sawdust Substrate
sawdust_supplemented.Description: Enriched sawdust with wheat bran for nutrition-demanding mushrooms.

hardwood_chips.Name: Hardwood Chips Substrate
hardwood_chips.Description: Chunky hardwood substrate for bracket fungi.

hardwood_log.Name: Hardwood Log Substrate
hardwood_log.Description: Traditional log cultivation substrate for shiitake.

hardwood_stump.Name: Hardwood Stump Substrate
hardwood_stump.Description: Large stump substrate for maitake cultivation.

pine_log.Name: Pine Log Substrate
pine_log.Description: Specialized pine substrate for the ultra-rare matsutake. Extremely prone to contamination.
